name: resolver
title: AWS DNS — Route 53 Resolver
summary: Creates Route 53 Resolver inbound/outbound endpoints, per-domain forwarding (and SYSTEM override) rules with VPC associations, and optional query logging.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: create_inbound_endpoint
module.description: Whether to create an inbound resolver endpoint (lets on-premises resolvers query Route 53 private zones).

module.name: inbound_subnet_ids
module.description: Subnet IDs for the inbound endpoint ENIs. At least two subnets in different AZs are required by AWS when the inbound endpoint is created.

module.name: inbound_security_group_ids
module.description: Security group IDs attached to the inbound endpoint ENIs (must allow TCP/UDP 53 from on-premises resolver ranges).

module.name: create_outbound_endpoint
module.description: Whether to create an outbound resolver endpoint (forwards queries from the VPC to on-premises or other resolvers).

module.name: outbound_subnet_ids
module.description: Subnet IDs for the outbound endpoint ENIs. At least two subnets in different AZs are required by AWS when the outbound endpoint is created.

module.name: outbound_security_group_ids
module.description: Security group IDs attached to the outbound endpoint ENIs (must allow TCP/UDP 53 egress to target resolvers).

module.name: forwarding_rules
module.type: map(object({ domain_name = string rule_type = optional(string, "FORWARD") target_ips = optional(list(object({ ip = string port = optional(number, 53) })), []) vpc_ids = optional(list(string), []) }))
module.description: Map of resolver rules keyed by logical name. FORWARD rules require target_ips and the outbound endpoint (create_outbound_endpoint = true). SYSTEM rules override a broader FORWARD rule to restore Route 53 resolution for a subdomain. vpc_ids associates each rule with VPCs.

module.name: query_log_destination_arn
module.description: Optional ARN of a CloudWatch log group, S3 bucket, or Kinesis Firehose for resolver query logging. Null disables query logging.

module.name: query_log_vpc_ids
module.description: VPC IDs to associate with the query logging configuration. Only used when query_log_destination_arn is set.

outputs.name: inbound_endpoint_id
outputs.description: ID of the inbound resolver endpoint, or null when not created.

outputs.name: inbound_endpoint_ips
outputs.description: IP addresses of the inbound endpoint ENIs (targets for on-premises conditional forwarders). Empty when not created.

outputs.name: outbound_endpoint_id
outputs.description: ID of the outbound resolver endpoint, or null when not created.

outputs.name: rule_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical rule name to resolver rule ID.

outputs.name: rule_association_ids
outputs.description: Map of '<rule-key>/<vpc-id>' to resolver rule association ID.

outputs.name: query_log_config_id
outputs.description: ID of the resolver query log configuration, or null when query logging is disabled.
